message.content:
分析 OpenCoreSDK 的 inject 模式实现机制：

1. 查找 INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR 相关的代码
2. 查找 LD_PRELOAD 相关的实现
3. 查找 signal handler 的安装机制
4. 分析 inject 模式的工作流程

重点关注：
- opencore_jni.cpp
- opencore.cpp / opencore.h
- build 脚本

输出：inject 模式的完整工作流程和代码实现细节

attachment.content:
- coredump: Analyze an Android coredump file. Print a Java class and its members, or drill into any field by address.
- init-explore: Initialize knowledge base and run comprehensive codebase exploration with auto-update system
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- superpowers:brainstorming
- superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
- superpowers:executing-plans
- superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
- superpowers:receiving-code-review
- superpowers:requesting-code-review
- superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- superpowers:systematic-debugging
- superpowers:test-driven-development
- superpowers:using-git-worktrees
- superpowers:using-superpowers
- superpowers:verification-before-completion
- superpowers:writing-plans
- superpowers:writing-skills
- claude-mem:babysit
- claude-mem:design-is
- claude-mem:do
- claude-mem:how-it-works
- claude-mem:knowledge-agent
- claude-mem:learn-codebase
- claude-mem:make-plan
- claude-mem:mem-search
- claude-mem:oh-my-issues
- claude-mem:pathfinder
- claude-mem:smart-explore
- claude-mem:timeline-report
- claude-mem:version-bump
- claude-mem:weekly-digests
- claude-mem:wowerpoint
- understand-anything:understand: Analyze a codebase to produce an interactive knowledge graph for understanding architecture, components, and relationships
- understand-anything:understand-chat
- understand-anything:understand-dashboard
- understand-anything:understand-diff
- understand-anything:understand-domain: Extract business domain knowledge from a codebase and generate an interactive domain flow graph. Works standalone (lightweight scan) or derives from an existing /understand knowledge graph.
- understand-anything:understand-explain
- understand-anything:understand-knowledge
- understand-anything:understand-onboard
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review

1 # OpenCoreSDK - Claude Code 项目配置 2 3 > 版本: 1.4.16 | 文档数: 5 | 最后更新: 2026-06-07 4 5 ## 项目信息 6 7 **OpenCoreSDK** 是一个跨平台崩溃捕获和 ELF Core Dump 生成 SDK，支持 ARM64/x86/RISC-V 等多架构，主要用于 Android 应用的 Native 崩溃分析。 8 9 ### 核心能力 10 11 - 崩溃捕获: 捕获 SIGSEGV/SIGABRT/SIGFPE/SIGILL/SIGBUS/SIGTRAP 信号 12 - ELF Core Dump: 生成标准 ELF core 文件 13 - Inject 模式: LD_PRELOAD 注入，零代码修改启用 14 - 多架构支持: ARM64 (PAC/MTE)、x86_64、x86、ARM、RISC-V 15 16 ### 技术栈 17 18 | 层级 | 技术 | 19 |------|------| 20 | Java API | Coredump.java (单例模式) | 21 | JNI 桥接 | opencore_jni.cpp | 22 | 线程管理 | AndroidJNI.cpp (EAJNI) | 23 | 核心引擎 | opencore.h | 24 | 架构实现 | arm64/lp64/lp32/x86_64/x86/riscv64 | 25 | 构建系统 | Gradle + CMake (Android NDK) | 26 27 --- 28 29 ## 知识使用规则 ⚠️ 重要 30 31 回答技术问题前，必须先检查知识库： 32 33 1. **识别问题主题**: 判断属于哪个技术领域 34 2. **检查知识文档**: 根据索引表使用 `Read` 工具加载对应文档 35 3. **基于文档回答**: 引用文档内容给出准确答案 36 37 --- 38 39 ## 知识库索引 40 41 | 编号 | 标题 | 类别 | 摘要 | 42 |------|------|------|------| 43 | 01 | [OpenCoreSDK 项目概览](./docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md) | overview | 版本 1.4.16，项目定位和技术栈概览 | 44 | 02 | [OpenCoreSDK 架构分析](./docs/exploration/02-architecture-analysis.md) | architecture | 8 层架构设计、单例/Observer/Template Method 等设计模式 | 45 | 03 | [OpenCoreSDK 领域知识](./docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md) | domain | 6 个业务领域、核心术语、ELF Core Dump 格式 | 46 | 04 | [OpenCoreSDK 学习路径](./docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md) | learning | 10 步学习路径，3 小时系统掌握 | 47 | 05 | [SDK 集成指南](./docs/exploration/05-sdk-integration.md) | integration | 两种集成方式：源码依赖和 Inject 模式 | 48 49 --- 50 51 ## 快速导航 52 53 ### 入门 54 1. 阅读 [项目概览](./docs/exploration/01-project-overview.md) 了解项目背景 55 2. 阅读 [学习路径](./docs/exploration/04-learning-path.md) 制定学习计划 56 57 ### 深入理解 58 3. 阅读 [架构分析](./docs/exploration/02-architecture-analysis.md) 掌握设计思想 59 4. 阅读 [领域知识](./docs/exploration/03-domain-knowledge.md) 理解核心概念 60 61 --- 62 63 ## 自动知识沉淀规则 64 65 ### 触发条件（满足任一即触发） 66 67 1. **代码深度分析**: 回答涉及 3+ 个源文件路径 68 2. **架构讨论**: 包含"架构"、"分层"、"设计模式"等关键词 69 3. **图表输出**: 回答包含 Mermaid 流程图/时序图 70 4. **集成指南**: 包含"集成"、"接入"、"如何使用"等 71 5. **复杂流程**: 包含"流程如下"、"步骤是"、"首先/然后/最后" 72 6. **用户要求**: 用户明确说"沉淀"、"保存"、"记录" 73 74 ### 沉淀流程 75 76 1. 判断项目是否有 `docs/exploration/` 目录 77 2. 创建编号文档（如 `05-xxx.md`） 78 3. 文档格式：问题背景 → 核心流程 → 实现细节 → 应用场景 → 总结 79 4. 更新本文件的知识库索引 80 5. 告知用户：`✅ 知识已沉淀至 docs/exploration/XX-xxx.md` 81 82 --- 83 84 ## 核心依赖链 85 86 ```mermaid 87 graph LR 88 A["Coredump.java
Java SDK"] --> B["opencore_jni.cpp
JNI 桥接"] 89 B --> C["AndroidJNI.cpp
EAJNI 线程管理"] 90 C --> D["opencore.h
Core Dump 引擎基类"] 91 D --> E["lp64::OpencoreImpl
通用 ELF Core 生成"] 92 E --> F["arm64::Opencore
ARM64 特定实现"] 93 ``` 94 95 --- 96 97 ## 关键文件位置 98 99 | 文件 | 描述 | 100 |------|------| 101 | `opencore/src/main/java/penguin/opencore/sdk/Coredump.java` | Java SDK 单例入口 | 102 | `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/opencore_jni.cpp` | JNI 桥接层 (15 个 native 方法) | 103 | `opencore/src/main/cpp/eajni/android/AndroidJNI.cpp` | EAJNI 线程管理 | 104 | `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/opencore.h` | Core Dump 引擎基类 | 105 | `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/arm64/opencore.cpp` | ARM64 特定实现 (PAC/MTE) | 106 | `opencore/src/main/cpp/opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp` | LP64 通用实现 (ELF64 Core Dump) | 107 108 --- 109 110 ## 知识图谱 111 112 - 节点统计: 30 个 113 - 边统计: 29 条 114 - 层级: 8 层 115 - 学习步骤: 10 步 116 117 知识图谱文件: `.understand-anything/graph.json` 118

16	cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10.2)
17	project("opencore")
18	
19	file(READ ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/VERSION version_contents)
20	string(REGEX MATCH "MAJOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
21	set(MAJOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
22	string(REGEX MATCH "MINOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
23	set(MINOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
24	string(REGEX MATCH "PATCH=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
25	set(PATCH ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
26	add_definitions(-D__OPENCORE_VERSION__="opencore-${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}")
27	
28	include_directories(.)
29	include_directories(eajni/include/)
30	aux_source_directory(eajni SRC_LIST)
31	add_library(eajni STATIC ${SRC_LIST})
32	find_library(log-lib log)
33	target_link_libraries(eajni ${log-lib})
34	
35	if (ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "arm64-v8a")
36	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
37	        opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp
38	        opencore/arm64/opencore.cpp)
39	elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi-v7a")
40	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
41	        opencore/lp32/opencore.cpp
42	        opencore/arm/opencore.cpp)
43	elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi")
44	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
45	        opencore/lp32/opencore.cpp
46	        opencore/arm/opencore.cpp)
47	elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "x86_64")
48	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
49	        opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp
50	        opencore/x86_64/opencore.cpp)
51	elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "x86")
52	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
53	        opencore/lp32/opencore.cpp
54	        opencore/x86/opencore.cpp)
55	elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "riscv64")
56	    set(OPENCORE_IMPL
57	        opencore/lp64/opencore.cpp
58	        opencore/riscv64/opencore.cpp)
59	endif()
60	
61	add_library(opencore SHARED
62	            opencore/opencore.cpp
63	            ${OPENCORE_IMPL}
64	            opencore_jni.cpp)
65	target_link_libraries(opencore eajni)
66	set_target_properties(opencore PROPERTIES LINK_FLAGS "-Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384")
67

content.content:
1	# OpenCoreSDK 普通应用集成指南
2	
3	> 问题来源: 用户问答 | 沉淀时间: 2026-06-07 | 评分: 6分
4	
5	## 问题背景
6	
7	用户询问普通 Android 应用如何集成 OpenCoreSDK。
8	
9	## 集成方式
10	
11	### 方式一：源码依赖集成（推荐）
12	
13	#### 1. 添加 Gradle 依赖
14	
15	在 `settings.gradle` 中包含 SDK 模块：
16	```groovy
17	include ':opencore'
18	project(':opencore').projectDir = new File(rootProject.projectDir, '../path/to/opencore')
19	```
20	
21	在 `app/build.gradle` 中添加依赖：
22	```groovy
23	dependencies {
24	    implementation project(path: ':opencore')
25	}
26	```
27	
28	#### 2. 使用 Java API
29	
30	```java
31	import penguin.opencore.sdk.Coredump;
32	
33	// 1. 设置崩溃完成回调
34	Coredump.getInstance().setListener(new Coredump.Listener() {
35	    @Override
36	    public void onCompleted(String path) {
37	        Log.i("Coredump", "Core file: " + path);
38	    }
39	});
40	
41	// 2. 启用 Native 崩溃捕获
42	Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.NATIVE);
43	
44	// 3. 启用 Java 崩溃捕获（可选）
45	Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.JAVA);
46	```
47	
48	#### 3. 配置项（可选）
49	
50	```java
51	// 设置 core 文件保存目录
52	Coredump.getInstance().setCoreDir("/sdcard/Android/data/your.app/files");
53	
54	// 设置超时时间（毫秒）
55	Coredump.getInstance().setTimeout(5000);
56	
57	// 设置过滤器
58	Coredump.getInstance().setFilter(Coredump.FILTER_SPECIAL_VMA 
59	    | Coredump.FILTER_SHARED_VMA);
60	
61	// 设置标志
62	Coredump.getInstance().setFlag(Coredump.FLAG_CORE 
63	    | Coredump.FLAG_PROCESS_COMM 
64	    | Coredump.FLAG_TID);
65	```
66	
67	### 方式二：Inject 模式（零代码修改）
68	
69	通过 `LD_PRELOAD` 注入，**无需任何代码修改**：
70	
71	#### 1. 构建带 Inject 模式的 SDK
72	
73	```bash
74	# 设置 NDK 路径
75	export ANDROID_NDK_HOME=/path/to/ndk
76	
77	# 构建 Inject 模式
78	cd script
79	./build.sh inject
80	```
81	
82	#### 2. 配置 LD_PRELOAD
83	
84	```bash
85	# 在 init.rc 或启动脚本中设置
86	setprop libopencore.preload /data/local/tmp/libopencore.so
87	```
88	
89	或创建 `wrap.sh`：
90	```bash
91	#!/system/bin/sh
92	export LD_PRELOAD=/data/local/tmp/libopencore.so
93	exec "$@"
94	```
95	
96	## 核心 API 速查
97	
98	| API | 描述 |
99	|-----|------|
100	| `Coredump.getInstance()` | 获取单例实例 |
101	| `.enable(JAVA/NATIVE)` | 启用崩溃捕获 |
102	| `.disable(JAVA/NATIVE)` | 禁用崩溃捕获 |
103	| `.setListener(Listener)` | 设置完成回调 |
104	| `.doCoredump(filename)` | 手动触发 dump |
105	| `.setCoreDir(path)` | 设置保存目录 |
106	| `.setFilter(flags)` | 设置 VMA 过滤器 |
107	| `.setFlag(flags)` | 设置输出标志 |
108	
109	## 完整示例
110	
111	```java
112	package com.example.myapp;
113	
114	import android.os.Bundle;
115	import android.util.Log;
116	import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
117	import penguin.opencore.sdk.Coredump;
118	
119	public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity implements Coredump.Listener {
120	
121	    @Override
122	    protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
123	        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
124	        
125	        // 设置回调监听器
126	        Coredump.getInstance().setListener(this);
127	        
128	        // 启用 Native 崩溃捕获
129	        Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.NATIVE);
130	        
131	        // 可选：启用 Java 崩溃捕获
132	        Coredump.getInstance().enable(Coredump.JAVA);
133	    }
134	
135	    @Override
136	    public void onCompleted(String path) {
137	        Log.i("MyApp", "Core dumped: " + path);
138	        // 上传 core 文件或做其他处理
139	    }
140	}
141	```
142	
143	## 权限要求
144	
145	```xml
146	<!-- AndroidManifest.xml -->
147	<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
148	<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
149	```
150	
151	## 架构支持
152	
153	| ABI | 架构 |
154	|-----|------|
155	| `arm64-v8a` | ARM64 (推荐) |
156	| `armeabi-v7a` | ARM 32-bit |
157	| `x86_64` | x86-64 |
158	| `x86` | x86 32-bit |
159	
160	> **注意**: 推荐使用 `arm64-v8a`，支持 PAC/MTE 等安全特性
161

166	- [学习路径](./04-learning-path.md) - 10 步入门指南

content.thinking: The build.sh doesn't seem to have the inject build. Let me search more specifically for how the inject mode is built, particularly looking for where INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR is defined as a compiler macro.

I need to find how the inject mode is built. Looking at the code, the INJECT_OPENCORE_DIR macro is defined in opencore_jni.cpp (lines 211-246), and when this macro is defined, a constructor function `opencore_ctor_init()` is called automatically when the shared library is loaded.

This is a classic pattern for LD_PRELOAD injection - the constructor attribute on `opencore_ctor_init()` means this function runs automatically when the shared library is loaded via `LD_PRELOAD`.

Let me check if there's any more documentation or if the build script supports inject mode as a separate build target. Let me also look at the native-lib.cpp to understand how the SDK is loaded.

1 # OpenCoreSDK 架构分析 2 3 > 生成时间: 2026-06-07 | 来源: architecture-analyzer agent 4 5 ## 逻辑分层架构 (8层) 6 7 | Layer | 名称 | 文件数 | 核心职责 | 8 |-------|------|--------|----------| 9 | `layer:java-api` | Java API Layer | 2 | Coredump单例SDK暴露Java/Native双crash处理API | 10 | `layer:jni-bridge` | JNI Bridge Layer | 1 | Java native方法到C++核心函数的映射桥接 | 11 | `layer:eajni` | EAJNI Utility Layer | 5 | Android JNI线程attach/detach、日志工具 | 12 | `layer:core-engine` | Core Dump Engine Layer | 2 | ELF格式core dump生成、Signal处理、StopTheWorld | 13 | `layer:architecture-impl` | Multi-Arch Implementation | 14 | 7种CPU架构特定实现 | 14 | `layer:build-config` | Build Configuration | 5 | Gradle构建配置、CMake原生编译 | 15 | `layer:infrastructure` | Infrastructure | 1 | Docker容器化构建环境 | 16 | `layer:documentation` | Documentation | 1 | 项目文档 | 17 18 ## 设计模式识别 19 20 | Pattern | 位置 | 描述 | 21 |---------|------|------| 22 | **Singleton** | `Coredump.java:29` | `private static final Coredump sInstance = new Coredump()` 全局唯一实例 | 23 | **Observer** | `Coredump.java:343-345` | `Listener`接口实现回调通知完成 | 24 | **Template Method** | `opencore.h:135` | `virtual bool DoCoredump()` 基类定义，各架构子类重写 | 25 | **Handler-Pattern** | `Coredump.java:290-332` | 双`HandlerThread`异步消息处理 | 26 | **Bridge** | `opencore_jni.cpp` | JNI层将Java API与C++核心逻辑解耦 | 27 28 ## 数据流向 29 30 ```mermaid 31 graph LR 32 A["Coredump.java
doCoredump()"] --> B["Handler: opencore-bg Thread"] 33 B --> C["opencore_jni.cpp
nativeCoredump()"] 34 C --> D["Opencore::Dump()"] 35 D --> E["架构特定实现
arm64/lp64/lp32..."] 36 E --> F["ELF Core Dump File"] 37 F --> G["Handler: opencore-post Thread"] 38 G --> H["Listener::onCompleted(path)"] 39 ``` 40 41 ## Signal 处理和线程控制流程 42 43 ```mermaid 44 sequenceDiagram 45 participant Signal 46 participant Opencore 47 participant StopTheWorld 48 participant ParseMaps 49 participant ELFDumper 50 51 Signal->>Opencore: SIGSEGV/SIGABRT 52 Opencore->>StopTheWorld: StopTheWorld(pid) 53 StopTheWorld->>StopTheWorld: 遍历/proc/pid/task 54 StopTheWorld->>StopTheWorld: SIGSTOP 暂停线程 55 StopTheWorld->>ParseMaps: ParseMaps(pid) 56 ParseMaps->>ELFDumper: VMA列表 57 ELFDumper->>ELFDumper: 写入ELF NOTE段 58 ELFDumper->>ELFDumper: 写入ELF LOAD段 59 ELFDumper->>Opencore: callbackEvent(filepath) 60 ``` 61 62 ## 组件依赖图 63 64 ```mermaid 65 graph TD 66 subgraph Java_API 67 A["Coredump.java
(Singleton)"] 68 B["MainActivity.java"] 69 end 70 71 subgraph JNI_Bridge 72 C["opencore_jni.cpp"] 73 end 74 75 subgraph EAJNI 76 D["AndroidJNI.cpp"] 77 E["Thread.cpp"] 78 end 79 80 subgraph Core_Engine 81 F["opencore.h"] 82 end 83 84 subgraph Arch_Impl 85 G["arm64/opencore.cpp"] 86 H["lp64/opencore.cpp"] 87 I["lp32/opencore.cpp"] 88 end 89 90 A --> C 91 B --> A 92 C --> D 93 C --> F 94 F --> H 95 F --> G 96 H --> I 97 ``` 98 99 ## 多架构实现架构 100 101 ``` 102 Opencore (Base Class) 103 │ 104 ├── arm64/opencore.cpp EM_AARCH64 (183) 105 ├── arm/opencore.cpp EM_ARM (40) 106 ├── x86_64/opencore.cpp EM_X86_64 (62) 107 ├── x86/opencore.cpp EM_386 (3) 108 ├── lp64/opencore.cpp EM_X86_64 (LP64数据模型) 109 ├── lp32/opencore.cpp EM_386 (LP32数据模型) 110 └── riscv64/opencore.cpp EM_RISCV (243) 111 ``` 112 113 **架构设计**: Template Method Pattern - 基类定义统一`DoCoredump()`接口，各架构通过重写`getMachine()`返回特定ELF Machine Type 114 115 ## EAJNI JNI 封装层 116 117 | 函数 | 描述 | 118 |------|------| 119 | `getJNIEnv()` | 获取当前线程 JNIEnv | 120 | `createJavaThread()` | 创建 Attach 到 JVM 的 Native 线程 | 121 | `AttachCurrentThread()` | Attach 当前线程到 JavaVM | 122 | `DetachCurrentThread()` | Detach 当前线程 | 123 124 ## Coredump.java 双 HandlerThread 异步架构 125 126 - **opencore-bg**: 处理 coredump 请求（阻塞等待 native 完成） 127 - **opencore-post**: 处理完成后回调通知（非阻塞） 128 129 ## 相关文档 130 131 - [项目概览](./01-project-overview.md) - 项目基本信息 132 - [领域知识](./03-domain-knowledge.md) - 核心业务领域 133 - [学习路径](./04-learning-path.md) - 10 步入门指南 134
